news.title: Watch: a video platform elevating admissions and student support
news.summary_en: Explore the latest video platform from When in Culture, empowering international students to feel confident and connected to their university.
news.author: The PIE News team

news.title: No rebound for the US as F-1 visa slump deepens
news.summary_en: After dramatic declines during peak visa issuance months, September 2025 saw no relief for US colleges and prospective students, as stakeholders warn of severe and uneven sector impacts.
news.author: Polly Nash
